---
name: New Skill Proposal
about: Suggest a new Login Enterprise skill
labels: enhancement
---

## Skill name

`login-enterprise-<name>`

## What it does

Describe the skill's purpose in 1-3 sentences.

## When it triggers

What user prompts or keywords should activate this skill?

## Prerequisites

What does the skill need to run? (e.g., Windows, Python, specific tools)

## Output

What does the skill produce? (e.g., a `.cs` file, an `app-map.json`)

## Why it's useful

Who benefits and how?
